visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a live-action shot in a Costco warehouse aisle. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black and white top and a black pleated skirt, stands before a large stack of orange and black snack boxes. She enthusiastically gestures toward the product, picking up a large cardboard box to show the camera. Other shoppers and high warehouse shelving filled with various bulk goods are visible in the background under bright fluorescent lighting. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a store shelf price tag showing a numerical value of 289. The camera then quickly pans across stacks of the snack boxes, emphasizing the large quantity available within the retail environment. (3) The setting shifts to a bright indoor home kitchen where two women are seated at a table. The first woman continues to hold a snack bag, while a second woman wearing a dark beret joins her. They interact dynamically, eating square-shaped crackers and gesturing with expressive hand movements. The background includes a white kitchen counter with a microwave and some home decor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 辣妹拿什麼. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Variety]: 爽辣. [Subtitle]: 討論度爆高停不下來！. [Slogan]: 爽辣青花椒餅乾. (3) [Subtitle]: 這討論度超高的哎. [Slogan]: 喜年來新品爽辣. (4) [Logo]: 喜年來. [Subtitle]: 夏天就是要吃青花椒. (5) [Subtitle]: 喔我好怕辣喔. [Subtitle]: 一定要試嗎. [Subtitle]: 回去看看好不好吃. (6) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 289元一大箱. (7) [Variety]: 5月話題度最高的餅乾. [Subtitle]: 喜年來新出的爽辣V青花椒餅乾. [Slogan]: 爽辣V青花椒餅乾. (8) [Subtitle]: 它是原本經典的喜年來蔬菜餅變成青花椒口味. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後它的青花椒呢吃起來嗯. [Variety]: 好吃好吃好吃好吃. (10) [Subtitle]: 鹹甜鹹甜的所以我們覺得老少鹹宜. (11) [Subtitle]: 它的青花椒也不會辣吃起來就是麻麻的口感也非常的過癮喔. (12) [Subtitle]: 大家可以試試看一箱有20包一包是15塊沒錯.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 2 shoppers in the distant Costco background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one has long black hair wearing a black and white top, the other wears a dark beret and a light-colored dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse with high shelves and bulk merchandise; a modern home kitchen with white counters and appliances.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, high-arousal female voice speaking Mandarin at a fast rate with an animated, promotional tone. An upbeat electronic pop background track with a steady 4/4 beat and bright synthesizer textures runs continuously. Multiple high-frequency percussive 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects occur in rapid succession, marking the rhythm of the speech. (2) There is a hard cut in the audio as the speaker delivers specific price information. The vocal intensity remains high and consistent, and the BGM maintains its tempo. A faint warehouse reverberation is identifiable in the background noise floor behind the primary signal. (3) Two female voices engage in a fast-paced, enthusiastic dialogue, often overlapping with exclamations. A distinct, high-transient percussive sound occurs repeatedly, resembling the crisp texture of biting into a cracker. The BGM remains energetic throughout. Frequent synthesized comedy sound effects like 'boing' and 'whistle' sounds are used for structural emphasis during the flavor review.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Retail Context -> Tasting Reaction -> Price Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review a new 'Shao La V' green peppercorn flavored cracker available at Costco, emphasizing its unique salty-sweet taste and mass appeal.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, mention of store-exclusive price, and explicit brand name callouts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social-native product review with frequent visual and auditory cues designed to maintain high engagement.
